caption: A young man with light-colored hair and glasses stands in a professional presentation setting, likely a conference room or lecture hall. He is wearing a black t-shirt featuring a yellow and white logo that includes the word "KNUT" and a lanyard with an identification badge around his neck. He stands before a light-colored wall with a projection screen visible above him. In front of him is a desk or podium holding a computer monitor, a white bottle of water, and other small office supplies. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his head and facial expressions. He maintains a relaxed posture, with one hand resting in his pocket. The camera angle shifts slightly, moving from a medium shot to a slightly wider view that reveals more of the desk equipment in the foreground.
